videos.headline: Oklahoma grabs pick-six, 2-point conversion to take lead over Auburn
videos.description: Oklahoma takes a 63-yard interception return to the house, and Michael Hawkins Jr. puts his body on the line to successfully grab the 2-point conversion.

videos.headline: Michael Hawkins Jr. sprints in for a 48-yard Oklahoma TD
videos.description: Michael Hawkins Jr. escapes the pressure and rushes up the middle for a 48-yard touchdown to give Oklahoma a 7-0 lead.
